.specify/extensions/git/scripts/powershell/auto-commit.ps1:158-160 runs git add . then git commit

method: focused static trace plus negative control review
evidence: Direct config and script evidence proves enabled Spec Kit workflows stage the entire worktree. .gitignore reduces common .env/build-artifact exposure but does not constrain git add . to known Spec Kit paths or require review before commit.

facts: Local developer/tooling workflow, not remote runtime. Preconditions require a developer to run enabled Spec Kit hooks while unignored sensitive files or unintended generated files are present. Impact is accidental commit exposure with possible later push.
